name: Capstone Copper Corp.
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$14.0499. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$14.1754 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$14.0499, stop A$12.4443, target A$14.9000. Risk/reward is 0.53:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
